positive: A vibrant, highly stylized celestial biome design featuring interlocking geometric lunar phases and stylized constellations like the Ursa Major and Orion. The central elements should be bold, clean silhouettes of mythical flora and fauna (e.g., a crescent winged fox, crystalline moon lilies, geometric hummingbirds). Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, cosmic teal, electric violet, and metallic gold accents. The composition must be symmetrical and centered, suitable for a circular or chest print. The style should be a blend of Art Deco graphic design and esoteric botanical illustration, rendered with sharp lines, negative space emphasis, and a sticker/patch art aesthetic. Isolated on a pure, solid background for maximum contrast.
negative: blur, text, signature, watermark, logo, jpeg artifacts, noisy, grainy, low contrast, amateur, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, mutated, messy, clutter, low resolution
